title: calamagrostis angustifolia var. tenuis
intro: Calamagrostis angustifolia var. tenuis, also known as slender fescue, is a perennial grass native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to reduce fever and treat digestive issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, and may also exhibit antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Calamagrostis angustifolia var. tenuis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion to be used as a herbal remedy, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
